title: Russian Pea Soup
description: A creamy and comforting soup made with fresh peas, perfect for a cold day. This recipe serves as a delicious and authentic take on a traditional Russian dish.
instructions: Heat the borscht soup in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the peas, Russian seasoning, and water to the pot. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the peas are tender.
Stir in the sour cream until well combined.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
